zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Columbers於大約1254年出生時，她的父親Philip de Colombières46歲，母親Egelina de Courtenay29歲。她於1272年11月12日之前與Sir Gilbert Hansard III結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1313年之後在英國林可爾史爾。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Columbers was born about 1254, her father, Philip de Colombières, was 46 and her mother, Egelina de Courtenay, was 29. She married Sir Gilbert Hansard III before 12 November 1272. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died after 1313, in Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Columbers est née environ 1254, son père, Philip de Colombières, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Egelina de Courtenay, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gilbert Hansard III avant 12 novembre 1272. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée après 1313, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Columbers(이)가 대략 1254년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip de Colombières(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Egelina de Courtenay(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1272년 11월 12일 이전 Sir Gilbert Hansard III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1313년 이후 영국 링코실르에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Columbers родилась около 1254 г., её отцу по имени Philip de Colombières было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Egelina de Courtenay, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gilbert Hansard III перед 12 ноябрь 1272 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла после 1313 г. в местности линколншир, Англия.
